## ❓ Question
A clear and concise description of your question.

## 🖥️ Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 18.17.0]
- DeepCode CLI version: [e.g. 0.2.2]

## 🔍 What I've Tried
Describe what you've already tried to solve your problem.

## 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context that might help us answer your question.

## 💡 Suggestion
If you have suggestions for documentation improvements related to this question, please let us know!
